name: Double Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate and shortening for the filling.
2. For the crust, stir together crushed wafers and melted butter. Press the mixture evenly over the bottom and 1-3/4 inches up the sides of a 9-inch springform pan. Place the pan in a shallow baking pan.
3. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese, sugar, melted chocolate, flour, and vanilla until well mixed. Add eggs one at a time, mixing on low speed just until combined. Do not overmix. Stir in milk.
4. Pour the filling into the crust.
5. Bake in a 350°F oven for about 45 minutes or until the center is nearly set when gently shaken. Cool on a wire rack for 5 to 10 minutes. Remove the sides of the pan and cover. Chill for 4-24 hours.
6. For decoration, pipe melted vanilla-flavored pieces into stars atop the cheesecake. Melt 1 square of chocolate and shortening in a small saucepan over low heat. Pipe into stars and chill until set.
Serves 12 Nutrition information per serving: 524 calories, 34 grams fat, 147 mg cholesterol, 369 mg sodium.
